results.title: Major new £33million care home investment unveiled for Anglesey
results.description: A new care and residential care home scheme in Menai Bridge represents a major investment in the care of older people in the area.

results.title: Ballymoney: Motorists warned of oil spill on stretch of Frosses Road
results.description: Motorists are warned of an oil spill on the Frosses Road before the Knockahollett Road junction Ballymoney bound on Thursday morning (June 18)
